cab_descripcion: Hi! I am Valentina, a 24-year-old engineer passionate about programming and robotics. I love learning, solving problems and creating impactful technological solutions.
per_descripcion_1: I am passionate about developing applications, games, and IOT projects which use microcontrollers.
per_descripcion_2: I enjoy working in teams where I can combine my experience in web development and my interest in technology to create innovative solutions.
per_descripcion_3: I am always looking for new challenges that allow me to learn and grow professionally.
